prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Grafana logs warn 'alert evaluation took longer than expected'. Find the Go source files in grafana/grafana that (1) implement the alerting evaluation scheduler tick and (2) detect and log when an evaluation cycle overruns its time budget.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Grafana logs warn 'alert evaluation took longer than expected'. Find the Go source files in grafana/grafana that (1) implement the alerting evaluation scheduler tick and (2) detect and log when an evaluation cycle overruns its time budget.
